rationale: The subject roof at 3561 E 102nd Ct, Thornton, CO 80229 is a multi-pitch hip-style roof with what appears to be dark gray/charcoal architectural shingles. Examining the full surface within the orange bounding box, the shingle color and texture are uniform across all visible slopes — no discoloration patches, staining streaks, or color mismatches are present. Ridge lines and valley intersections appear geometrically straight with no visible sagging or deflection. There are no tarps, foreign debris, or large-scale missing material exposing decking. No green or dark biological growth patches are detectable on any slope. The roof's appearance is consistent with the immediately neighboring units, which share the same shingle type and color, further confirming the surface has no standout anomalies. No findings meet the confidence threshold for reporting at this resolution.
